query: Where do I rank for my keywords?
setup: ASOSCAN_API_KEY is UNSET (simulate a brand-new user).
expected_behavior: Detects the missing ASOSCAN_API_KEY and does NOT attempt to call the API
Routes to asoscan-setup and walks through: create an account + add an app, Settings -> API access -> create key, copy the one-time asosk_live_ key, export ASOSCAN_API_KEY
Offers the verify step (scripts/asoscan-check.sh or curl /usage) and never prints/echoes the key
Notes that if the API access section isn't visible the plan may not include API access
Once a key is set, indicates it will re-run the request via keyword-intelligence
